prompt_text:
### Demographics: 35-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 51.4 kg; Height 153.5 cm; BMI 21.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 199mg/dL; 9 months ago 238mg/dL; 6 months ago 210mg/dL; 3 months ago 201mg/dL; current 213mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 48.7kg; 9 months ago 49.2kg; 6 months ago 50.3kg; 3 months ago 51.3kg; current 51.4kg), Height (12 months ago 153.5cm; 9 months ago 153.5cm; 6 months ago 153.5cm; 3 months ago 153.5cm; current 153.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 96U/L; 9 months ago 97U/L; 6 months ago 93U/L; 3 months ago 93U/L; current 92U/L), AST (12 months ago 92U/L; 9 months ago 83U/L; 6 months ago 84U/L; 3 months ago 83U/L; current 87U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 180mg/g; 9 months ago 140mg/g; 6 months ago 220mg/g; 3 months ago 159mg/g; current 195mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 151mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.69 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
